title: Heart of Texas Fellowship of Christian Athletes Victory Bowl Week Kicks Off

title: Elecom announces Ist Plus trackball mice with innovative 5-ball rollers
description: Elecom’s new Ist Plus wireless mice introduces 5‐ball rollers for smoother trackball operation, alongside models that retain traditional linear rollers. For corporate users, the optional 2.4 GHz Elecom Bridge E USB receiver provides encrypted connections.

title: Akron to host Juneteenth celebration at Lock 3 next month
description: The Downtown Akron Juneteenth Celebration is set for Sunday, June 7 from 2-8 p.m. at Lock 3. Admission is free.
